params_used.custom_text: // This module reads data from a 4-bit input port based on a 2-bit address signal. It is triggered by a clock signal and includes an active-high reset functionality. When the reset_n signal is high, the output `readdata` is set to zero; otherwise, when the specified address is non-zero, the module outputs the data received from the input port (`in_port`). This effectively creates a mechanism to read input data conditionally based on the address provided, functioning as a basic interface for data transfer in a digital system.
